# Vendored nanochat

This directory contains source code from the **nanochat** project.

- **Origin**: [https://github.com/karpathy/nanochat](https://github.com/karpathy/nanochat)
- **Author**: Andrej Karpathy
- **License**: MIT
- **Vendored Commit**: `dc54a1a`
- **Vendored Date**: 2026-05-21 (May 21, 2026)

## Purpose in Yubo
Used as a minimalist transformer objective for UHD (Ultra-High-Dimensional) zeroth-order optimization experiments. Vendoring allows for direct parameter manipulation and the potential integration of custom fused kernels (e.g., Triton) without external dependency conflicts.

## Modifications
- None (Initial vendoring).
